apps.name: HealthSync
apps.localizedDescription: HealthSync securely synchronizes your health data between Apple Health and your Android devices.

privacy.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: We need access to your health data to sync it to your Android device.
privacy.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: We need access to your health data to sync it.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: We need access to the local network to find the Android synchronization server.
